projects.description: CFG Ninja Security Assessments (Audits) Repository, here you will find our reports, Remeber to read them all. CFG Ninja Team have over 25+ years in Cyber Security Experience, the blockchain was born from this so CFG Ninja was born in it.  “The root problem with conventional currency is all the trust that’s required to make it work. The central bank must be trusted not to debase the currency, but the history of fiat currencies is full of breaches of that trust.” ~ (Satoshi Nakamoto).
